overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval fantasy city at dusk, entering a candle-lit tavern or brothel, and walking through its crowded interior filled with NPCs, red decor, and wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway overlooking medieval city

events.description: turns right while walking along the elevated wooden walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated wooden walkway, ascending stairs and admiring the medieval cityscape below

entered.detail: raised wooden platform with plank flooring and railings
tall brick wall with arched stained glass windows
lit paper lanterns suspended from wooden posts
thick wooden posts supporting the roof structure
cluster of medieval towers and buildings against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along an elevated wooden walkway at dusk, with red brick walls on the left and views of the medieval city below. Paper lanterns provide warm lighting as he turns right along the covered path, approaching a doorway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor lounge with lattice windows and seating areas

events.description: enters the dimly lit interior from the outdoor walkway through a wooden doorway
begins descending the wooden staircase to the main floor

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper floor of the tavern, passing by patrons socializing near tables and dancers

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress leaning against the wooden railing
group of three patrons conversing near a candle-lit table

entered.detail: dark wooden panel walls with decorative trim
wooden lattice screens covering the windows
wooden tables with lit candles and food items
red fabric wall hangings with patterns
wooden balustrade overlooking the main floor below

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the building from the walkway, transitioning to a dimly lit upper floor with wooden walls and lattice windows. The space features candle-lit tables, red tapestries, and scattered NPCs socializing. He walks past patrons and dancers before approaching the staircase to descend.

scene_state.functional_zone: main tavern hall with bar, stage, and performance areas

events.description: descends wooden stairs and enters the bustling main floor of the tavern
turns toward the red curtained stage area while exploring the main hall

agents.ego_description: descending to the main floor and walking through the crowded tavern, passing the bar and performance areas

notable_agents.action: armored guard in red standing near the stage curtains
musicians playing instruments on a raised platform

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs with carved railings leading down
large hanging chandelier with multiple lit candles
heavy red velvet drapes framing a performance stage
long wooden bar with bottles and candles
classical-style statues mounted on the wooden walls

segments.scene_description: Geralt descends the stairs into the main tavern hall, which is densely populated with NPCs. The space features a large chandelier, red stage curtains, a bar counter, and wall-mounted statues. He walks through the crowd, passing a guard and musicians, exploring the lively candle-lit interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a twilight city walkway into the warm, crowded interior of a candle-lit tavern. It begins with Geralt walking along an elevated wooden path beside red brick walls, guided by the glow of paper lanterns as he turns toward a doorway. As he enters the building, the scene shifts to a dimly lit upper floor characterized by wooden lattice windows and red tapestries where patrons and dancers socialize. The camera then follows him as he descends a staircase, transitioning from the intimate upper level into a sprawling main hall. Finally, the environment opens up into a lively, densely populated space featuring a large chandelier, red stage curtains, and musicians, as he weaves through the crowd toward the bar.
